title: pilosella mollicaulis
intro: Pilosella mollicaulis, also known as False Foxes Tail, is a species of flowering plant in the sunflower family, native to Europe and Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects, making it useful for treating wounds, skin conditions, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Pilosella mollicaulis include reducing inflammation, fighting off infections, and promoting wound healing. In herbal preparations, the plant is often made into a tea, infusion, or tincture to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
